news.headline: ‘Extremely violent’: 2 teenagers among 4 dead in Belgium after train hits school bus
news.summary:
Four people, including two teenagers, were killed in Belgium on Tuesday when a train crashed into a school bus on a level crossing near the town of Buggenhout, RTL TV reported, citing Transport Minister Jean-Luc Crucke.

news.headline: Rescuers in Laos Scramble to Reach 7 People Trapped in Flooded Cave
news.summary: The group, which was searching for gold, has been trapped for almost a week. Divers who were involved in the 2018 rescue of a Thai youth soccer team have joined the operation.

news.headline: Palestine's Eid dampened by consequences of war on livestock
news.summary: Palestinians in Gaza facing another grim Eid holiday, which starts Tuesday evening. The livestock sector there has been destroyed by the war, and Israel isn't allowing the import of live animals, making the traditional animal sacrifice nearly impossible.
